notes: Offline-first delta sync (frontend is drift-backed). GET /sync?since=<cursor> returns rows changed since the cursor across all synced entities (Customers, Debts, Payments, Reminders), tombstones for deletes, and a new cursor. All synced rows carry updatedAt (server-authoritative) + version (monotonic int). Writes across the API carry If-Match: version=N; a stale write -> 409 { error, current: {...} }; client re-applies. Conflict resolution: last-writer-wins per field-set. Local writes are truth until synced — server never silently discards an offline write. This resource owns the /sync endpoint + shared versioning/tombstone conventions the schema agent bakes into every synced table.
